programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart travels to Cleveland. Rob Ward remembers trying to stop a robbery, Mike Polk Jr. compares first and second weddings, and Nelsin Davis pleads for Cleveland to fix its potholes.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Tamar Braxton take us along as they visit Tamar's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Russell Peters take us along as they visit Russel's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Deon Cole take us along as they visit Deon's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and other celebrities play a comic fictionalized version of themselves in this parody of similarly named reality shows. Episodes often feature Kevin Hart's attempts to gain celebrity and his jealousy of his friends.

programme.title: Let Go
programme.desc: Follows the intertwining stories of Walter Dishman, a melancholy parole officer struggling with the doldrums of married life, and three eccentric ex-convicts recently placed under his supervision.

programme.title: Let Go
programme.desc: Follows the intertwining stories of Walter Dishman, a melancholy parole officer struggling with the doldrums of married life, and three eccentric ex-convicts recently placed under his supervision.

programme.title: Budz House
programme.desc: When Bud discovers a treasure trove of weed underneath his house, he becomes the most popular stoner on his block.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Nick and Kevin compete for the last star on The Hollywood Walk of Fame.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin attempts to meet with Paramount President, Doug Howard, to put his dream project into development.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin accidentally takes drug-laden candies; Trina and the guys do an intervention to send Kevin to rehab.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin checks into a rehab center for some court mandated therapy. Things go from bad to worse until Nia Long checks in to work on her own issues.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Russell Peters take us along as they visit Russel's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Deon Cole take us along as they visit Deon's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Gina Yashere take us along as they visit Gina's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Brandon T. Jackson take us along as they visit Brandon's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Brandon T. Jackson take us along as they visit Brandon's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Affion Crockett take us along as they visit Crockett's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: Women Write Now S2
programme.desc: Three short films designed to champion and elevate the voices of Black female comedy writers. Featuring the following shorts films: Hey Boo, Power Dynamics and Night Off.

programme.title: 4 Play
programme.desc: Unsatisfied with his prior romantic achievements, Todd goes on a quest to date three women at one time.

programme.title: Women Write Now S1
programme.desc: Three short films designed to champion and elevate the voices of Black female comedy writers. Featuring the following shorts films: Black Karen, Buddy & Bernice and Take the Job.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart visits Philadelphia and welcomes sets from TuRae Gordon, Anthony Moore, Lawrence Killebrew and Skeet Carter.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and other celebrities play a comic fictionalized version of themselves in this parody of similarly named reality shows. Episodes often feature Kevin Hart's attempts to gain celebrity and his jealousy of his friends.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and other celebrities play a comic fictionalized version of themselves in this parody of similarly named reality shows. Episodes often feature Kevin Hart's attempts to gain celebrity and his jealousy of his friends.

programme.title: When a Woman's Fed Up
programme.desc: Taryln is a powerful and career-driven woman with a high tolerance for her husband's foolishness. When she discovers that her man has been unfaithful, she hatches a devious plot to teach her "better half" a lesson he will never forget.

programme.title: Women Write Now S1
programme.desc: Three short films designed to champion and elevate the voices of Black female comedy writers. Featuring the following shorts films: Black Karen, Buddy & Bernice and Take the Job.

programme.title: All Wifed Out
programme.desc: A guy spends a wild night in NYC as he tries to decide whether or not he should remain with his girlfriend.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart travels to Baltimore. Ty Davis discusses the joys of the cougar lifestyle, Sir Alex chats about gambling with kids, and Ivan Martin encourages a gas station bootlegger.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart travels to Oakland. G. King calls out his friends who only want go to his free shows, Cody Woods looks back on going to an all-black school, and Mario Hodge recalls getting carjacked.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart travels to San Diego. Dustin Nickerson tells kids not to follow their dreams, Adrian "ADEE" McCovy describes an expensive first date, and Keith Johnson explains why he's the "iPhone 29 of people."

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart travels to San Diego. Dustin Nickerson tells kids not to follow their dreams, Adrian "ADEE" McCovy describes an expensive first date, and Keith Johnson explains why he's the "iPhone 29 of people."

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Gina Yashere take us along as they visit Gina's favorite restaurant.

programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Brandon T. Jackson take us along as they visit Brandon's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and Affion Crockett take us along as they visit Crockett's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and other celebrities play a comic fictionalized version of themselves in this parody of similarly named reality shows. Episodes often feature Kevin Hart's attempts to gain celebrity and his jealousy of his friends.

programme.title: Freaky Deaky
programme.desc: Set in 1974, a pair of '60s radicals rely on their bomb-making skills on their way to becoming capitalists.

programme.title: Freaky Deaky
programme.desc: Set in 1974, a pair of '60s radicals rely on their bomb-making skills on their way to becoming capitalists.

programme.title: All Wifed Out
programme.desc: A guy spends a wild night in NYC as he tries to decide whether or not he should remain with his girlfriend.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin is initially offered the lead in a Sammy Davis, Jr. biopic; and believes the role will propel his career to a new level.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Trina's seductive baby sister, Kat Shaw, elicits the 'real' scoop on Nick for an article she's writing.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Hoping to pick up where they left off last year, Kevin is searching for NIA LONG in local AA meetings.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and DJ Envy take us along as they visit Envy's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart braves the heat of the Phoenix comedy scene to host stand-up from James "JayMac" McCowan, Jill Kimmel, Bryan Ricci and Terrence DeLane.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and other celebrities play a comic fictionalized version of themselves in this parody of similarly named reality shows. Episodes often feature Kevin Hart's attempts to gain celebrity and his jealousy of his friends.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and other celebrities play a comic fictionalized version of themselves in this parody of similarly named reality shows. Episodes often feature Kevin Hart's attempts to gain celebrity and his jealousy of his friends.

programme.title: When a Woman's Fed Up
programme.desc: Taryln is a powerful and career-driven woman with a high tolerance for her husband's foolishness. When she discovers that her man has been unfaithful, she hatches a devious plot to teach her "better half" a lesson he will never forget.

programme.title: All Wifed Out
programme.desc: A guy spends a wild night in NYC as he tries to decide whether or not he should remain with his girlfriend.

programme.title: Women Write Now S1
programme.desc: Three short films designed to champion and elevate the voices of Black female comedy writers. Featuring the following shorts films: Black Karen, Buddy & Bernice and Take the Job.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart travels to Atlanta to check out performances from stars of the city's stand-up scene, including Kareem "Plug" Chapman, Mario Tory, David Perdue and Sweet Baby Kita.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Ken Boyd, Crystal Powell, Alfred Kainga and Tim Mathis perform stand-up for Kevin Hart when he touches down in Houston.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents: Hart of the City
programme.desc: Kevin Hart goes to Sacramento to spotlight up-and-coming comedians BT Kingsley, Ellis Rodriguez and JR De Guzman.

programme.title: URBAN EATS & TREATS
programme.desc: Rip Micheals and DJ Envy take us along as they visit Envy's favorite restaurant.

programme.title: FailFactory: Wheels Go 'Round
programme.desc: Well that took a painful turn.

programme.title: FailFactory: Challenge Accepted
programme.desc: One day they'll win, right?

programme.title: FailFactory: Mo Money Mo Fails
programme.desc: This is why we can't have nice things.

programme.title: FailFactory: 9 to Fail
programme.desc: We might need HR for this one.

programme.title: FailFactory: Ruff Stuff
programme.desc: Some dogs are smart! Others, are these dogs.

programme.title: FailFactory: Oops!... I Did It Again
programme.desc: The writing on the wall mvet have been in another language.

programme.title: FailFactory: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: No height restrictions on this wild ride.

programme.title: FailFactory: Surfs Down Bro
programme.desc: A bad day on the water is better than a good day at work.

programme.title: FailFactory: Man Vs. Nature
programme.desc: SPOILER ALERT: Nature wins.

programme.title: FailFactory: Failcation
programme.desc: What happens on vacation, stays on vacation. Unless someone caught it on camera and sent it to ve.

programme.title: FailFactory: Wild Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: Lots of tails... but mostly fails.

programme.title: FailFactory: Roll the Dice
programme.desc: A mashup of random fails... jvet for the fun of it.

programme.title: FailFactory: Fail Season
programme.desc: It's that time of the year.

programme.title: FailFactory: WildLife
programme.desc: These animals can't be tamed.

programme.title: FailFactory: Medic!
programme.desc: Wear a helmet, watch your step, and don't do what these people did. You'll hurt yourself!

programme.title: FailFactory: Spin the Wheel
programme.desc: There's no rhyme or reason to the order of these fails.

programme.title: FailFactory: Accidents Happen
programme.desc: Oops!

programme.title: FailFactory: Survivor
programme.desc: Was the challenge worth the fail? Sometimes!

programme.title: FailFactory: Kung Fu Failure
programme.desc: These grasshoppers have a long way to go.

programme.title: FailFactory: Fading Friendships
programme.desc: These friends take peer pressure to a painful level.

programme.title: FailFactory: BroArmy
programme.desc: Bro! Check out these bros! This episodes all about bro-ing down.

programme.title: FailFactory: Summer Bummers
programme.desc: Ever heard of some good ol' summer time sadness?

programme.title: FailFactory: Animal (Out of) Control
programme.desc: From derpy dogs to scaredy cats, it's all here.

programme.title: FailFactory: Derpy Dogs
programme.desc: Every dog has its fail day. If it was caught on camera, chances are it's in this episode.

programme.title: FailFactory: Head, Shoulders, Knees and Toes
programme.desc: A bad hair day is the least of these people's problems.

programme.title: FailFactory: Gravity Always Wins
programme.desc: Someone's gotta test the laws of physics.

programme.title: FailFactory: Hold My Juicebox
programme.desc: Raising kids is no picnic.

programme.title: FailFactory: Pain and Gain
programme.desc: Working out doesn't always work out.

programme.title: FailFactory: Freedom Fails
programme.desc: Nothing says “America!” like being an idiot with fireworks.

programme.title: FailFactory: Home Wreckers
programme.desc: Please don't try this at home.

programme.title: FailFactory: Loud AF
programme.desc: Turn up the volume and get ready for some LOUD NOISES that will have you going WTF.

programme.title: FailFactory: Redneck Redemption
programme.desc: If you're in this episode, you might be a redneck.

programme.title: FailFactory: Bungle Gym
programme.desc: These people clearly need to get a new hobby.

programme.title: FailFactory: Failloween
programme.desc: People seem to make a lot of terrible decisions when wearing a costume.

programme.title: FailFactory: Greatest of All Time
programme.desc: This episode is all about the GOAT... and other farm animals.

programme.title: Frasier: The Guilt Trippers
programme.desc: Frasier og Roz er bekymret over deres fortsatte venskab, efter de har sovet sammen. Niles tager til England og leder efter Daphnes far, der er forsvundet.

programme.title: Frasier: Moons over Seattle
programme.desc: Niles får Daphnes far til Seattle i håbet om at overbevise ham om at blive genforenet med hendes mor.

programme.title: Frasier: The Ring Cycle
programme.desc: Niles og Daphne faker to bryllupsceremonier efter at være flygtet til Reno.

programme.title: Frasier: Enemy at the Gate (Mr. Beemer's Big Stand)
programme.desc: Frasier nægter at betale for en uretfærdig bøde i en parkeringsgarage.

programme.title: Frasier: Proxy Prexy
programme.desc: Martin stiller op til bestyrelsesformand i lejlighedskomplekset og Frasier gør alt arbejdet.

programme.title: Frasier: Kissing Cousin
programme.desc: Roz føler sig gammel, da hendes nogen og tyve år gamle kusine kommer til byen.

programme.title: Frasier: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Frasier planlægger hævn, da Bulldog narrer ham med en Halloween-spøg.

programme.title: Frasier: Star Mitzvah
programme.desc: Frasier holder en tale i Klingon til sin søns Bar Mitzvah.

programme.title: Frasier: Bristle While You Work
programme.desc: Niles frygter, at hans tandpiner er et symptom på en hjertesygdom.

programme.title: Frasier: Rooms with a View
programme.desc: Niles' operation giver tid til reflektion over fortiden, nutiden og fremtiden.

programme.title: Frasier: Don't Go Breaking My Heart
programme.desc: Niles må mande sig op efter en virkelig slem forskrækkelse.

programme.title: Frasier: We Two Kings
programme.desc: Niles og Frasier slås om, hvem der skal holde familiejulen.

programme.title: Frasier: Door Jam
programme.desc: Frasier og Niles stjæler en nabos invitation til et elite-spa.

programme.title: Frasier: The Harassed
programme.desc: En ny økonomianalytiker på stationene får Frasier ud på dybt vand.

programme.title: Frasier: Lilith Needs A Favor
programme.desc: Lilith kommer til Seattle for at spørge Frasier, om han vil være far til endnu et barn.

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne Does Dinner
programme.desc: Daphne holder et katastrofalt middagsselskab.

programme.title: Frasier: Trophy Girlfriend
programme.desc: Frasier dater en kvinde, der minder ham om hans onde gymnasielærer.

programme.title: Frasier: Fraternal Schwinns
programme.desc: Frasier og Niles lærer at cykle til et KACL-velgørenhedsarrangement.

programme.title: Frasier: Kenny On The Couch
programme.desc: Frasier søger råd hos Kenny efter din smertefulde skilsmisse.

programme.title: Frasier: Roe to Perdition
programme.desc: Frasier og Niles indgår en aftale med en undergrunds-kaviarleverandør.

programme.title: Frasier: Some Assembly Required
programme.desc: Frasier melder sig frivilligt til at bygge et hus for en Habitat for Humanity-projekt.

programme.title: Frasier: Farewell, Nervosa
programme.desc: Frasier og Niles boycotter Café Nervosa, da ejeren ansætter en folk-sanger.

programme.title: Frasier: The Devil and Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Frasier bliver jaloux, da Dr. Phil kommer til Seattle.

programme.title: Frasier: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: Martin frygter, at han ikke er Niles og Frasiers biologiske far.

programme.title: Frasier: Analyzed Kiss
programme.desc: Frasier bliver forbløffet, da Julia uventet kysser ham.

programme.title: Frasier: A New Position for Roz
programme.desc: Roz bliver usædvanlig jaloux, da Frasier begynder at date Julia.

programme.title: Frasier: No Sex Please, We're Skittish
programme.desc: Roz kræver sit job stationen tilbage. Daphne opdager, hun er gravid.

programme.title: Frasier: A Man, A Plan And A Gal: Julia
programme.desc: Julia ødelægger Niles og Daphnes nyhed, om at de venter barn.

programme.title: Frasier: The Doctor Is Out
programme.desc: En misforståelse får folk i byen til at tro, at Frasier er homoseksuel.

programme.title: Frasier: The Babysitter
programme.desc: Frasier konkurrerer med Martin om følelserne for sin barndoms babysitter.

programme.title: Frasier: The Placeholder
programme.desc: Frasiers mangel på romantik for alle til at prøve at få ham til at date.

programme.title: Frasier: I'm Listening
programme.desc: Martin beskylder Frasier for at være kronisk smuglytter.

programme.title: Frasier: Maris Returns
programme.desc: Niles lyver for Daphne om sine frokostplaner med Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: Murder Most Maris
programme.desc: Niles bryder sammen under presset fra Maris' mordsag.

programme.title: Frasier: Guns N' Neuroses
programme.desc: En fremmed arrangerer en blind date for Frasier med Lilith.

programme.title: Frasier: Seabee Jeebies
programme.desc: Frasier er jaloux på Niles' berømmelse, der kommer af Maris' mordsag.

programme.title: Frasier: High Holidays
programme.desc: Martin bliver høj på brownie glaseret med pot. Frederick besøger 'the dark side'.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Lite
programme.desc: Frasier konkurrerer i et KACL-velgørenhedsarrangement om vægttab.
